description: Editable CaiLama chess model-role benchmark catalog. Router and task probes focus on ambiguous semantic decisions; deterministic routing/planning belongs in pytest.

tasks.label: Coach vs analyst under time trouble

tasks.prompt: I keep blundering when the clock runs low. Is this a tactics issue or should we rethink how I play?

tasks.label: Local B18 key position

FEN: rn1qkb1r/pp3ppp/2p1pnb1/4N3/3P4/6N1/PPP2PPP/R1BQKB1R w KQkq - 0 8
Candidate moves: Nxf7, Nd7, Nxg6, Nxc6
Task: Local B18 key position: classify candidate moves including checks, captures, and development consequences.
